Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 43}{f 0 1 2}Formidable Shadows{f 0 1 27} reside here, and beyond them lie treasure chests holding {f 0 1 2}valuable items{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can {f 0 1 2}face these challenges as often as you like{f 0 1 27}, so if you feel outmatched, consider revisiting after training some.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You may also find something in the Monad Chambers that you can't find anywhere else. You'll have to tread the Chambers themselves to figure out what.[n]{f 1 1}
